title: sclarea acuta
intro: Sclarea acuta, also known as African wormwood or Sclarea, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sclarea acuta include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Sclarea acuta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
